channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: Anthropic and the Gates Foundation are betting $200 million that AI can do more than make money
item.description: Anthropic has committed $200 million over four years to a partnership with the Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation, the largest deal of its kind between an AI company and a global philanthropy. The money, a mix of grant funding, Claude usage credits, and technica… [Anthropic]

item.title: Institutional investors boosted holdings of AI infrastructure plays during first quarter
item.description: PROVIDENCE, Rhode Island, May 15 : Institutional investors were eager buyers of stocks in companies whose fate hinges on the rollout and adoption of artificial intelligence during the first quarter of 2026, according to a Reuters overview of filings by nearly… [Intel]

item.title: Cerebras’ monster IPO, Cisco’s big quarter, and the AI factory’s real impact

item.title: Red Hat dials in on telco cloud modernization as legacy pressure mounts
item.description: Telco cloud modernization has become an urgent operational imperative for operators burdened by decades of siloed infrastructure and the demands of 5G, 6G and edge AI. A unified platform approach is now essential to deliver consistent lifecycle management, se… [ServiceNow]

item.title: Lake Tahoe Power Crunch Shows AI’s Growing Energy Toll in West
item.description: Lake Tahoe has long been a refuge for Silicon Valley’s tech elite, from Mark Zuckerberg to Larry Ellison. Now the artificial intelligence boom behind much of that wealth is straining the region’s power market, pushing up costs for residents in … [Intel, ServiceNow]

item.title: Where Are All The Data Centers?
item.description: If you liked this piece, please subscribe to my premium newsletter. It’s $70 a year, or $7 a month, and in return you get a weekly newsletter that’s usually anywhere from 5,000 to 18,000 words, including vast, detailed analyses of NVIDIA, Anthropic and OpenAI… [Nvidia, OpenAI, Anthropic]
